title: stoechas abrotanoides
intro: Stoechas abrotanoides, also known as absinthe or lemon catmint, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and a pungent, bitter taste. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stoechas abrotanoides include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Stoechas abrotanoides can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
